G

getId() - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Retrieves this product's ID.
getName() - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Retrieve's this product's name
getPrice() - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Retrieve's this product's price
getQuantity() - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Retrieve's this product's quantity (number of items in stock)
getReorderPoint() - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Retrieves the re-order point of this product, which is the quantity that should trigger re-ordering of this product.

P

Product - Class in terminallearning.week6
Product models an inventory item in a shop's inventory.
Product(String, String, double, int, int) - Constructor for class terminallearning.week6.Product
Construct's a Product with specific values.

S

setId(String) - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Places a valid id value into this product's ID member.
setName(String) - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Places a valid name string into this product's name member.
setPrice(double) - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Places a valid value into this product's price member.
setQuantity(int) - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Places a valid integer value into the quantity member.
setReorderPoint(int) - Method in class terminallearning.week6.Product
Places a valid integer value into the reorderPoint member.

Gets a String representation of this product, formatted.
